title: Futures: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of futures...
summary: Identify which features are not characteristic of standardized futures contracts.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of futures contracts?

options.text: Futures contracts are primarily regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading

solution: Futures contracts are primarily regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) rather than the SEC, which oversees securities.
